title: Hebe barkeri
taxonomy: Hebe barkeri is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, which is a flowering plant family native to New Zealand and Australia. It is a member of the genus Hebe, which is a group of evergreen shrubs commonly known as the hebe or hebe bush. The Plantaginaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are closely related to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Hebe barkeri is further classified as Hebe subgenus Pachyphylla and the species is also known as Veronica barkeri in some classifications. The classification of Hebe barkeri is subject to ongoing research and may be revised in the future.
